zh.Corsham, Wiltshire, , England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾可沙安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Burley於1523年出生在英國維爾爾波爾紹特時，她的父親John Burley22歲，母親Edith Longe21歲。她於1540年與William Hulbert在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1586年在英國可瓦爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.Corsham, Wiltshire, , England: 英国英格兰維爾爾可沙安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Burley于1523年出生在英国維爾爾波爾紹特时，她的父亲John Burley22岁，母亲Edith Longe21岁。她于1540年与William Hulbert在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1586年在英国可瓦爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Berley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Birley
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burlew
meanings: Probably a variant of   Burley   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Burley was born in 1523, in Poulshot, Wiltshire, England, her father, John Burley, was 22 and her mother, Edith Longe, was 21. She married William Hulbert in 1540, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1586, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Burley est née en 1523, à Poulshot, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Burley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Edith Longe, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William Hulbert en 1540, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1586, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Burley 1523 in Poulshot, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Burley 22 und ihre Mutter Edith Longe 21. Sie hat 1540 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom William Hulbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1586 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Burley è nata il nel 1523 nel Poulshot, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, John Burley, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Edith Longe, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William Hulbert nel 1540, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1586, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Burleyが1523年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアポウルショトで生まれた時，父John Burleyは22歳，母Edith Longeは21歳であった。1540年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでWilliam Hulbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1586年にイギリスコルンワルで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Burley(이)가 1523년 영국 윌츠히르 파우쇼트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Burley(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edith Longe(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 William Hulbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1586년 영국 코른월에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Burley nasceu em 1523, em Poulshot, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Burley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Edith Longe, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hulbert em 1540, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1586, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Burley родилась в 1523 г. в местности поулшот, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Burley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Edith Longe, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hulbert в 1540 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1586 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Burley nació en 1523, en Poulshot, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Burley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Edith Longe, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William Hulbert en 1540, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1586, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
